$comment: Two POC scenarios: (1) activity retry on classify, (2) invalid interrupt resume. Command/event names per RFC-04 §4.4–4.5.

activity_retry_classify.description: classify llm_call fails on first attempt; policy retries; second attempt succeeds; then technical path to search_kb and success.
activity_retry_classify.notes: ActivityFailed MUST record attempt/retry metadata per engine profile; subsequent ActivityRequested MAY share the same node id with incremented attempt.

invalid_resume_human_review.description: Switch default sends execution to human_review; RaiseInterrupt; external resume payload fails resume_schema validation; execution fails terminally (or engine-specific compensation before ExecutionFailed).
invalid_resume_human_review.notes: Assumes validation fails before a successful InterruptResumed is recorded. If the engine instead emits InterruptResumed then fails downstream, insert InterruptResumed before ActivityFailed. Document the chosen profile in engine docs and align this companion.

implementation_mapping: If code uses different symbol names, publish a table mapping engine identifiers to RFC-04 names; do not fork the taxonomy silently (see Story-1-3 technical notes).
